description_long: This handbag features a unique octagonal cylindrical shape with a structured body covered in a deep navy or slate blue fabric. The edges and handle are accentuated with brown leather trim, which is stitched visibly for added durability and style. The top of the bag has a short, sturdy handle, also in brown leather, attached with black metal hardware. There are two black metal latches on the side, likely serving as the closure mechanism, and a small black metal loop near the handle for additional security or attachment. The surface of the bag is mostly plain, with a subtle woven texture visible on the blue fabric. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments.
description: A structured, octagonal cylindrical handbag with blue fabric sides, brown leather trim, and black metal hardware, featuring a short top handle and visible stitching.
description_view_0: Front view shows the octagonal face with brown leather trim, blue fabric center, and the top handle partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical body, brown leather handle, and two black metal latches for closure.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the octagonal face with brown trim and blue fabric, but without the handle's hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the handle, latches, and the seam of the blue fabric.
attribute_strap_type: Single short handle, non-adjustable, attached with black metal hardware at the top center.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Dual black metal latches located on the side of the cylindrical body, securing the opening.
